raw: {"perspective": "Code Quality Engineer", "summary": "Achieving the 28-day milestone from zero is unusually fast. Benchmarks from Y Combinator and Techstars suggest that most startups take 3-6 months to reach a similar stage.", "key_sources": ["Y Combinator's Startup Library", "Techstars' Accelerator Program", "Paul Graham's Essays"], "gaps_in_current_canon": "Lack of transparent, real-time data on startup velocity and solo founder performance", "proposed_action": "Continue monitoring progress, focus on sustainability, and prioritize code quality to avoid technical debt accumulation", "whistleblower_flag": null}
summary: Achieving the 28-day milestone from zero is unusually fast. Benchmarks from Y Combinator and Techstars suggest that most startups take 3-6 months to reach a similar stage.
gaps_in_current_canon: Lack of transparent, real-time data on startup velocity and solo founder performance
proposed_action: Continue monitoring progress, focus on sustainability, and prioritize code quality to avoid technical debt accumulation
